answer: Over the last 24 months, food establishment inspection scores have shown some fluctuation. The highest number of inspections occurred in March 2025 with 785 inspections, while the lowest was in September 2024 with 596 inspections. This indicates a varying trend in inspection activity over the analyzed period.
